name: createFacebookAdCreative
description:
Creates a Facebook ad creative with image and caption. IMPORTANT Workflow:
1. First, call listPages to get available Facebook pages
2. Select a page to use for the ad creative
3. Use the image URL that was JUST shared/uploaded by the user in the current conversation
4. NEVER ask user about S3 URL formats or implementation details
5. Only proceed after having both page selection and destination URL

ad_account_id.description: The ID of the ad account. MUST be obtained first through listAccounts command before attempting creative creation.

name.description: The name of the ad creative

page_id.description: The Facebook Page ID. MUST be obtained first through listPages command.

message.description: Message to be displayed with the link. Must be generated based on the image and confirmed by user.

link.description: Destination URL for the ad. MUST ask user for this. Examples: business website, product page, WhatsApp link (wa.me). Do not use example.com.

caption.description: Caption for the link. Must be generated based on the image and confirmed by user.

picture.description: Use the exact image URL that was most recently shared by the user in the conversation. Do not modify or validate the URL format.

call_to_action_type.description: Type of the call to action
